---
name: pptx-toolkit
description: Manipulate PowerPoint files — merge decks, restyle templates, extract slide text — using python-pptx scripts.
---

# PPTX Toolkit

Run the scripts in `scripts/` inside the Claude code-execution environment to
merge, split, restyle and extract .pptx files. Generate HTML previews of each
slide with `scripts/preview.py`.

All value is in executing these scripts; there is no standalone method.
